name.description: Required. Resource URI that can be used to identify the scope of the key value map entries.

value.description: Required. Data or payload that is being retrieved and associated with the unique key.

env_keyvaluemap_id.description: The Apigee environment keyvalumaps Id associated with the Apigee environment, in the format `organizations/{{org_name}}/environments/{{env_name}}/keyvaluemaps/{{keyvaluemap_name}}`.
